Class BaseFileConsoleClientManager

java.lang.Object
src.baseabstractions.AbstractClientManager
src.workwithfiles.BaseFileConsoleClientManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
PersonClientManager<Person>, ProductClientManager<Product>
public class BaseFileConsoleClientManager extends AbstractClientManager implements ProductClientManager<Product>, PersonClientManager<Person>
File-based implementation of client managers for both Product and Person objects. Provides file reading-based creation and input handling for products and persons, designed for script execution and batch processing.

    • BaseFileConsoleClientManager

      public BaseFileConsoleClientManager(ReaderWriter readerWriter)
      Constructs a BaseFileConsoleClientManager with the specified reader/writer.
      Parameters:
      readerWriter - the reader/writer for file I/O operations

  • Method Details

    • getProduct

      public Product getProduct()
      Creates a new Product object through file-based input. Handles all product fields including automatic ID generation and owner creation.
      Specified by:
      getProduct in interface ProductClientManager<Product>
      Returns:
      the created Product object

    • createProductBuilder

      public ProductBuilder<Product> createProductBuilder(Product product)
      Creates a product builder initialized with the specified product.
      Specified by:
      createProductBuilder in interface ProductClientManager<Product>
      Parameters:
      product - the product to initialize the builder with
      Returns:
      a new product builder

    • buildProductInput

      public ProductBuilder<Product> buildProductInput(ProductBuilder<Product> productBuilder)
      Builds product input by reading all product fields from file. Includes reading of basic product fields and associated person (owner) using file-specific readers.
      Specified by:
      buildProductInput in interface ProductClientManager<Product>
      Parameters:
      productBuilder - the builder to use for product construction
      Returns:
      the updated product builder

    • getPerson

      public Person getPerson()
      Creates a new Person object through file-based input. Handles all person fields using file-specific readers.
      Specified by:
      getPerson in interface PersonClientManager<Person>
      Returns:
      the created Person object
